signals.headline: Solana ETFs Post Strong Inflows | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Solana ETFs Post Strong Inflows | YES | HIGH confidence**
Bitwise's Solana ETF attracted a $15.5 million inflow on April 17, 2026, bringing total net assets to $891.75 million, signaling sustained institutional demand.[3] This demonstrates continued specific demand from regulated investment vehicles and validates Solana's position as a core institutional asset.[3]

signals.headline: Solana Holders Hit All-Time High | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Solana Holders Hit All-Time High | YES | HIGH confidence**
Solana reached a record 166.9 million unique holders in April 2026, representing an 8.2% increase in Q1 2026 alone.[2] This 12% year-on-year growth indicates strong holder conviction despite price challenges.[2]

South Korea's Annual Inflation Rises to 2.2% YoY in March 2026 | YES | MED confidence**
